input.headline: Parasocial' is the Cambridge dictionary word of the year but what does it mean - and are you in a parasocial relationship?

raw.headline: Parasocial' is the Cambridge dictionary word of the year but what does it mean - and are you in a parasocial relationship?

winner: Why did the internet celebrity feel so lonely at her million-follower party? Because she was in a parasocial relationship with her fans.

candidates.text: In a shocking turn of events, it was reported today that I am now the Cambridge Dictionary's word of the year. They must have confused "parasocial relationship" with "obsessive admirer." Quite flattering, really.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific, with a clever twist on the meaning of 'parasocial relationship.' It uses natural English and has a light-hearted, self-deprecating tone that adds to its humor."}

candidates.text: In a twist that would make even the Oxford Comma blush, this year's Cambridge Dictionary word of the year is none other than "Parasocial." But here's a question for you: If you've ever been so enamored with a dictionary that you felt compelled to share your deepest thoughts and life stories with it, are you in a parasocial relationship? After all, one man's obsession is another dictionary's love affair.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative twist with the Oxford Comma reference, cleverly ties the concept of parasocial relationships to dictionary use, and is both specific and surprising."}

candidates.text: Why was the dictionary feeling so lonely at the party? It was stuck in a parasocial relationship with a room full of words.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever and ties the concept of 'parasocial relationship' to a dictionary in a relatable scenario. It's specific and surprising, though the pun could be slightly more refined for maximum impact."}

candidates.text: Why was the dictionary feeling lonely at a party? Because it found itself in too many parasocial relationships!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the topic but lacks specificity and surprise. The pun on 'parasocial relationships' is weak and not clearly tied to the dictionary's role."}

candidates.text: Why did the internet celebrity feel so lonely at her million-follower party? Because she was in a parasocial relationship with her fans.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relevant to the topic but lacks surprise and specificity. It's a bit generic and relies on a common trope about internet celebrities feeling lonely despite having many followers."}
